sp_theme.name: sw-brand-alt.css

sys_update_version.name: sp_theme_9e50073e78bef690b4196c8fb1ecadd5
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sp_theme"><sp_theme action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><css_variables>/* =============================================================================
   Smart Workspace - Alternate Brand Theme (Teal)
   =============================================================================
   Scoped under body.sw-theme-brand-alt to override primary color tokens.
   Uses a teal/green accent instead of blue for white-label deployments.
   ============================================================================= */

body.sw-theme-brand-alt {
    /* ----- Primary Palette (Teal) ----- */
    --sw-color-primary: #00897B;
    --sw-color-primary-hover: #00695C;
    --sw-color-primary-light: #E0F2F1;
    --sw-color-primary-lighter: #F0FAFA;
    --sw-color-primary-text: #FFFFFF;

    /* ----- Info inherits from primary ----- */
    --sw-color-info: #00897B;
    --sw-color-info-light: #E0F2F1;

    /* ----- Status: In Progress uses new primary ----- */
    --sw-status-in-progress: #00897B;

    /* ----- Medium priority uses new primary ----- */
    --sw-priority-medium: #00897B;
}

/* ----- Brand-alt theme adjustments for specific components ----- */

body.sw-theme-brand-alt .sw-avatar {
    background-color: #00897B;
}

body.sw-theme-brand-alt .sw-card__header-icon {
    background-color: #E0F2F1;
    color: #00897B;
}

body.sw-theme-brand-alt .sw-tabs__tab--active {
    color: #00897B;
    border-bottom-color: #00897B;
}

body.sw-theme-brand-alt .sw-tabs__tab:hover {
    color: #00897B;
    background-color: #F0FAFA;
}
</css_variables><footer/><footer_fixed>true</footer_fixed><header/><matching_now_experience_theme/><name>sw-brand-alt.css</name><navbar_fixed>true</navbar_fixed><sys_class_name>sp_theme</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>aniket.chaudhari</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-05 12:58:07</sys_created_on><sys_id>9e50073e78bef690b4196c8fb1ecadd5</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>sw-brand-alt.css</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Smart Studio Workspace" source="x_dxcis_smart_st_0">3c24ed4a783ab290b4196c8fb1ecad43</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="Smart Studio Workspace">3c24ed4a783ab290b4196c8fb1ecad43</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sp_theme_9e50073e78bef690b4196c8fb1ecadd5</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>aniket.chaudhari</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-05 12:58:07</sys_updated_on><turn_off_scss_compilation>false</turn_off_scss_compilation></sp_theme></record_update>
